blended.narrative: Mount St. Louis Moonstone is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
